# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
P.R.D.S delivers Israeli-grade human risk consulting for U.S. businesses. Stop fraud, theft, and bad hires with advanced OSINT and behavioral intelligence.

### Services
https://example.com/services
Beyond background checks: OSINT verification, behavioral analysis, and strategic interviewing to protect your business from costly hiring mistakes and fraud.

### Methodology
https://example.com/methodology
Discover our proven methodology combining advanced open-source intelligence, psychological profiling, and strategic interviews to uncover hidden risks.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to protect your business from internal risks? Contact P.R.D.S for discreet, high-level human risk consulting tailored to your sensitive hiring needs.
